questions.question: 序数词 'first' 的缩写形式是 '1st'。
questions.explanation: first结尾字母是st，缩写为1st。

questions.question: 'second' 变序数词直接在 two 后面加 nd。
questions.explanation: two对应的序数词是second，属于不规则变化。

questions.question: 在描述具体的日期时，如 'on May 4th'，应该使用介词 on。
questions.explanation: 在具体的某一天前要用介词on。

questions.question: 'twelfth' 的拼写是正确的（第十二）。
questions.explanation: twelve变序数词需要把ve变成f再加th。

questions.question: 句型 'When is the art show?' 是用来询问美术展在什么地方举办。
questions.explanation: When引导的疑问句询问的是时间，询问地点应使用Where。

questions.question: When is the party? It's ______ April 1st.
questions.explanation: 具体到某一天使用介词on。

questions.question: Children's Day is on June ______.
questions.explanation: 日期表达常用序数词，6月1日应为June 1st或June first。

questions.question: ______ is your birthday? It's in July.
questions.explanation: 答句提到的是月份时间，提问词用When。

questions.question: My father's birthday is on August ______.
questions.explanation: five变序数词需改ve为f再加th，即fifth。

questions.question: There are ______ special days in May.
questions.explanation: 肯定句中修饰可数名词复数用some。

questions.question: I have ______ pens. The ______ one is blue.
questions.explanation: 第一空表示数量用基数词，第二空表示顺序用序数词。

questions.question: Which of the following is correct?
questions.explanation: 21st读作twenty-first，缩写取last two letters即st。

questions.question: Is the singing contest on May 4th? ______.
questions.explanation: Is it开关的一般疑问句，肯定回答为Yes, it is。

questions.question: Today is Monday. Tomorrow is the ______ day of the week.
questions.explanation: 周日是第一天，周一是第二天，周二（明天）是第三天third。

questions.question: Those are ______ birthdays.
questions.explanation: 修饰名词birthdays需要用形容词性物主代词their。

questions.question: January is the ___ month of a year.
questions.explanation: 一月是一年中的第一个月。

questions.question: The sports meet is on October ___ (3rd).
questions.explanation: 3rd对应的完整单词拼写是third。

questions.question: ___ is the English test? It's on June 2nd.
questions.explanation: 提问具体时间使用疑问词when。

questions.question: There are 31 days in May. The last day is May ___.
questions.explanation: 31号应使用序数词thirty-first。

questions.question: 将英文表达与中文意思匹配。
questions.explanation: art show-美术展, sports meet-运动会, math test-数学测试, birthday-生日。

questions.question: 将序数词单词与对应的数字缩写匹配。
questions.explanation: second-2nd, twentieth-20th, third-3rd, twelfth-12th。

questions.question: 连词成句：the, show, When, is, art, ?
questions.explanation: 特殊疑问句结构为：疑问词+be动词+名词。

questions.question: 连词成句：is, May, It, on, 5th, .
questions.explanation: 肯定句结构为：主语+is+on+月份+序数词。

questions.question: 英文中所有的序数词都是以 'th' 结尾的。
questions.explanation: first(1st), second(2nd), third(3rd) 结尾不是th。

questions.question: 在单词 'thin' 和 'thirteen' 中，'th' 的发音是相同的。
questions.explanation: 这两个词中的th都发清辅音/θ/。

questions.question: 'twenty-third' 可以简写为 '23rd'。
questions.explanation: 二十三的序数词缩写符合rd结尾规则。

questions.question: Teachers' Day is on September 10th in China.
questions.explanation: 中国的教师节是9月10日。

questions.question: 单词 'this' 和 'math' 中 'th' 的发音一样。
questions.explanation: 'this' 中发/ð/，'math' 中发/θ/。

questions.question: There are ______ months in a year.
questions.explanation: 表示一年的月份数量，用基数词twelve。

questions.question: Tuesday is ______ day of the week.
questions.explanation: 序数词前通常要加定冠词the。

questions.question: When is the school trip? ______ October 12th.
questions.explanation: 回答时间时通常使用It is on + 日期。

questions.question: Whose birthday is it? It's ______ birthday.
questions.explanation: 表示“爷爷的”要用名词所有格's。

questions.question: My birthday is on March 3rd. What about ______?
questions.explanation: yours在此处相当于your birthday。

questions.question: Which word is spelled correctly?
questions.explanation: nine变序数词需去掉末尾的e再加th。

questions.question: ______ birthdays are in May? Three.
questions.explanation: 由Three可知是在询问数量，用How many。

questions.question: April is the fourth month. What is the ______ month?
questions.explanation: 四月的下一个月（五月）是第五个月fifth。

questions.question: We have an English party ______ April.
questions.explanation: 在具体的月份前常用介词in。

questions.question: Can you come to my party? ______.
questions.explanation: 邀请的肯定回答可以用Of course或Sure。

questions.question: There are some special days in June. The ___ day is Father's Day.
questions.explanation: 父亲节在六月的第三个(third)星期日。

questions.question: ___ is the school trip? It's in May.
questions.explanation: 询问日期或月份使用疑问词when。

questions.question: My birthday is on November ___ (20th).
questions.explanation: 20th的完整拼写是twentieth(y变ie加th)。

questions.question: We have an English test on April 10th. (对日期提问) ___ is the English test?
questions.explanation: 对具体日期提问用when。

questions.question: 将节日名称与日期匹配（连线形式转化）。
questions.explanation: National Day-10月1日, New Year's Day-1月1日, Christmas-12月25日, Teachers' Day-9月10日。

questions.question: 匹配基数词与序数词。
questions.explanation: one-first, two-second, eight-eighth, nine-ninth。

questions.question: 连词成句：birthday, your, is, When, mother's, ?
questions.explanation: 询问某人的生日：When is + 形容词性物主代词 + 名词所有格 + birthday?

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 序数词用来表示事物的顺序。1-3特殊记(first, second, third)；8去t, 9去e, ve变为f；ty结尾y变ie，最后th加在后。
knowledge_summary.tips: 记住口诀：一二三全变，th从四起，八去t，九去e，ve要用f替，ty变成tie。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 英语日期的书写通常为'月份+序数词'，如May 10th。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: 月份（首字母大写）+ 序数词缩写
common_mistakes: 忘记月份首字母要大写
knowledge_summary.tips: 书写时可以用阿拉伯数字+缩写(1st, 2nd)，朗读时要在序数词前加the。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 在月份、季节或年份前用in；而在具体的某一天或某个具体的日期前必须用on。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: in + 月份; on + 月份 + 几号
knowledge_summary.tips: 看到具体有'号数'或'星期'的日期，一定要选on。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: th在单词中主要有两种发音：清辅音/θ/和浊辅音/ð/。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: 数词th通常发/θ/；代词/冠词th通常发/ð/
knowledge_summary.tips: 咬舌尖。发/θ/时声带不震动（如three, thin），发/ð/时声带震动（如this, that, mother）。
